A

ACE - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Rank
 
addCard(Card) - Method in class fiveCard.Hand
adds a card to the hand, inserting it with an insertion sort by card value to ensure hands are sorted
adjustAceValueIfNeeded(int[], PokerHand.HandRank) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
When hand contains an ace, checks if hand uses ace as lowest value and sets it to be the lowest value if so.

B

betPhase(Bettor, Scanner, boolean, PokerHand) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Asks for bet and applies bet to a round of poker
Bettor - Class in fiveCard
Implements betting functionality.
Bettor() - Constructor for class fiveCard.Bettor
Empty constructor for the Bettor object.
Bettor(String, double, double) - Constructor for class fiveCard.Bettor
Parameterized Constructor for the bettor object.
breakTie(int[], int[]) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Breaks a tie by comparing the entirety of the hands passed through by card ranks
breakTie(PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank[], PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank[], int) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Breaks a tie for the case of pair based hand rankings (non kicker cards) and returns the result of this tie break

C

Card - Class in fiveCard
Implements the behavior of cards in a card Game.
Card(Card.Rank, Card.Suit) - Constructor for class fiveCard.Card
Constructor for the card class
Card.Rank - Enum Class in fiveCard
Enum that represents card rank
Card.Suit - Enum Class in fiveCard
Enum that represents a card's suit
cardByCountAndRank() - Constructor for class fiveCard.PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank
Default constructor for cardByCountAndRank
cardsLeft() - Method in class fiveCard.Deck
Returns the amount of cards left in the deck that haven't been drawn already
CasinoCardGame - Class in fiveCard
Abstract class that enforces the structure required for a casino card game.
CasinoCardGame(Hand, Hand) - Constructor for class fiveCard.CasinoCardGame
Constructor for CasinoCardGame
clear() - Method in class fiveCard.Hand
Removes all cards from the hand array, leaving the hand empty
CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Suit
 
CmdLineInput - Class in fiveCard
Enables command line input and validation for populating player and banker hands for smoother testing.
CmdLineInput() - Constructor for class fiveCard.CmdLineInput
 
collectWinnings(Hand, Hand) - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Carries out a bet based on the result of if the player wins or loses
comparatorIntToHandResult(int) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Translates the meaning of the compareTo method for PokerHand into the HandResult enum
compareTo(Hand) - Method in class fiveCard.Hand
A generalized comparison between hands based on the total value of the cards in a hand
compareTo(Hand) - Method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Compares PokerHands with poker scoring rules, returning the how the calling object compares to the passed object

D

deal() - Method in class fiveCard.Deck
Retrieves the card at the top of the draw pile, only allows the deal if not drawing past the reshuffleCount value
dealer - Variable in class fiveCard.CasinoCardGame
Acts as the dealer who plays against the player in a casino card game
dealIgnoringReshuffle() - Method in class fiveCard.Deck
Retrieves the card at the top of the draw pile, ignoring if we pass reshuffleCount
deck - Variable in class fiveCard.CasinoCardGame
Acts as the deck the player and dealer use for the card game
Deck - Class in fiveCard
Represents all data and operations for a deck of standard playing cards used in various casino games.
Deck(int) - Constructor for class fiveCard.Deck
Constructor for a deck, Fills deck with 1 of each card type, based on the suit and rank enums.
DIAMONDS - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Suit

FIVE - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Rank

FLUSH - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.PokerHand.HandRank
 
FOUR - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Rank

FULL_HOUSE - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.PokerHand.HandRank
 

G

getBalance() - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Returns the player's current balance
getBetInstruction(Scanner) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Asks and collects input for making a betting decision
getCard(int) - Method in class fiveCard.Hand
Returns the card at a given position
getCardCount() - Method in class fiveCard.Hand
Returns how many cards there is in the hand object
getCardCount() - Method in class fiveCard.PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank
Returns the amount of the card
getCardRankVal() - Method in class fiveCard.PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank
Returns the rank of the card
getEntryPay() - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Gets the player's required minimum bet (in poker, this is the small blind)
getHandRank() - Method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Determines and returns the rank of the hand based on 5 card poker rankings
getKickerArr(Hand, PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank[], int) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
This function is solely for when the hand type is one that has nonkicker cards.
getName() - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Returns the name of the bettor
getRankArray() - Method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Returns an int representation of the hand object, done by each card's value (rank value in particular)
getReshuffleCount() - Method in class fiveCard.Deck
Getter for the reshuffleCount, which denotes when the deck should be reshuffled
getRoundWinnings() - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Returns the winnings the bettor/player would have if they won their bet
getStringResults() - Method in enum class fiveCard.PokerHand.HandResult
Evaluates the result of a poker game to a string representation so that it can be printed
getSuit() - Method in class fiveCard.Card
Returns the suit of the card
getTop() - Method in class fiveCard.Deck
Getter for the top value, which references where the top of the draw pile is
getTotalWinnings() - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Returns the net winnings of the bettor, in terms of the money they started with and what they have now
getUserRaise(Bettor, Scanner) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Collects user/player's raise value with validation checking to ensure an acceptable value is given.
getValue() - Method in class fiveCard.Card
Returns the value of the card based on the card's rank

H

hand - Variable in class fiveCard.Hand
Dynamic Array structure for storing Cards in the hand
Hand - Class in fiveCard
This class represents all data and related operations for a hand of playing cards for use in various card games.
Hand() - Constructor for class fiveCard.Hand
Default constructor for hand class
handleBet(Bettor, Scanner, boolean, PokerHand, PokerHand) - Method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Carries out the bet phase, but with handling for when a fold occurs (except it does not skip a round on its own, only prepares the round for being skipped)
hasAceAsLowest(int[], PokerHand.HandRank) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Evaluates if hand has an ace and if the ace is treated as lowest card in the hand or not
hasKickers(PokerHand.HandRank) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Determines if the handRank has kickers or not, based on poker definitions for hand ranks.
HEARTS - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Suit
 
HIGH_CARD - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.PokerHand.HandRank
 

I

insertAceToFront(int[]) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Inserts an ace to the front of the hand at the lowest possible card value in place (as in doesn't return a separate array)
isCallerWinner(PokerHand, PokerHand) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Contains all the functionality for determining the winner of a single poker game
isCallerWinnerForTie(PokerHand.HandRank, PokerHand, PokerHand) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Contains all the functionality for determining the winner of a tie.
isValidBetCommand(String) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Returns if string is an accepted betting comamand for poker
isValidRaise(Bettor, double) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Validates if the passed raise value is an acceptable raise based on the current wager and balance

JACK - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Rank
 

K

kickerBreakTie(Hand, Hand, PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank[], PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank[]) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerHand
Determines the kickers of both hands and breaks the tie on the kicker cards, returning the game result.
KING - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Rank
 

L

LOSE - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.PokerHand.HandResult
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Runs a simulation of the casino game poker, with multiple rounds of betting, discards, and draws, for 1 player and an "AI" dealer.

NINE - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.Card.Rank
 

O

ONE_PAIR - Enum constant in enum class fiveCard.PokerHand.HandRank
 

P

parseArguments(String[], Hand, Hand) - Static method in class fiveCard.CmdLineInput
Parses command line argument and populates hands with the input
placeBet(double) - Method in class fiveCard.Bettor
Raises bet up to the given number
play(String...) - Method in class fiveCard.CasinoCardGame
Abstract method for running the casino card game's logic
play(String...) - Method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Runs the entire poker game, carrying out drawing, dealing, discarding, and betting.
player - Variable in class fiveCard.CasinoCardGame
Acts as the player who plays against the dealer in the casino card game
PokerCasinoGame - Class in fiveCard
implements the entirety of the game of poker through the fivecard package and game specific functions declared in this file.
PokerCasinoGame(double) - Constructor for class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Constructor for the PokerCasinoGame object
PokerException - Exception in fiveCard
Implements error handling for poker.
PokerException(String) - Constructor for exception fiveCard.PokerException
Constructor for PokerException
PokerHand - Class in fiveCard
Implements the behavior of hands in poker.
PokerHand() - Constructor for class fiveCard.PokerHand
 
PokerHand.cardByCountAndRank - Class in fiveCard
Class for destructuring a card by its count and rank.
PokerHand.HandRank - Enum Class in fiveCard
enum for the rank of a poker hand
PokerHand.HandResult - Enum Class in fiveCard
enum for the result of comparing two poker hands (who won)
populateRankMap() - Static method in class fiveCard.CmdLineInput
Populates map with all possible card ranks for duplicate checking
populateSuitMap() - Static method in class fiveCard.CmdLineInput
Populates map with all possible card suits
printBalance(Bettor) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Prints the balance of the player
printPotVal(Bettor) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Displays the total value being betting between dealer and player combined.
printTotalWinnings(Bettor) - Static method in class fiveCard.PokerCasinoGame
Displays the net winnings of the player in poker through @see fiveCard.Bettor#getTotalWinnings() getTotalWinnings

toString() - Method in class fiveCard.Card
Constructs a string representation of the card, with the first 1-2 chars of the string being the rank, and the last char being the rank

Represents the hand array of the hand object in a string representation and returns it
